creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #20)
CONFIGURE_ENV+= INDGEN_CFLAGS="-I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
                MOZ_REQUIRE_SIGNING="" \
You don't need "\" at last line.
 
I can't understand how you tested the port before submitting patch?
Always build it (better in poudriere and on live system) and check with portclippy from ports-mgmt/portfmt and with portlint.

Why did you add this:
LIB_DEPENDS=   libdav1d.so:multimedia/dav1d \
               libaom.so:multimedia/aom \
               libharfbuzz.so:print/harfbuzz

firefox, firefox-esr, librewolf and tor-browser don't have these lines.
